title: astragalus marinus
intro: Astragalus marinus, also known as Sea Bean or Dune Bean, is a type of perennial plant that belongs to the legume family. It is native to the coastal areas of Europe, Asia, and North Africa, and is widely cultivated for its medicinal properties. The plant is rich in flavonoids, saponins, and other bioactive compounds, which have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. Astragalus marinus is commonly used in traditional medicine to boost the immune system, reduce stress and fatigue, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory diseases, and can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures.
